title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Godrej Properties - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Godrej Properties - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
